title: Why I Chose RabbitMQ over HTTP for Microservice Messaging
description: AMQP vs HTTP for internal service communication — durability guarantees, backpressure, and why a broken notification service should never touch the booking flow.

title: Solving Payment Idempotency: How We Eliminated Double-Charges
description: bKash retried a webhook, 23 users got charged twice. A deep dive into Redis SET NX, INSERT ON CONFLICT, and building truly idempotent payment handlers.

title: N+1 Queries at Scale: From 5,000 DB Calls to One
description: How a multi-vendor product listing worked fine in staging and collapsed in production. MongoDB $lookup aggregation pipelines, compound indexes, and a CI query-count gate.

title: TDD at 80%: How We Made Test Coverage a Team Default
description: Reaching ~80% Jest + SuperTest coverage without slowing delivery. Practical strategies for TDD adoption, co-located tests, and enforcing quality through code review rather than fear.
